chronology_steps.title: Truth lock and source intake
chronology_steps.what: Validated HEAD/branch/status/root and executed preflight truth checks.
chronology_steps.why: Admissibility requires strict baseline truth lock.
chronology_steps.how: Use as baseline proof for all generated artifacts.

chronology_steps.title: Orientation grounding
chronology_steps.what: Read orientation PDFs and baseline gate/policy/audit artifacts.
chronology_steps.why: Roadmap must preserve Gate Spine intent while expanding to whole-repo fusion.
chronology_steps.how: Use source list as doctrine anchor for follow-up tasks.

chronology_steps.title: Roadmap doctrine registration
chronology_steps.what: Registered 0-12 stage roadmap with sequencing and status semantics.
chronology_steps.why: Creates one direction for all next tasks.
chronology_steps.how: Use stage order as planning corridor and acceptance reference.

chronology_steps.title: Readiness reality capture
chronology_steps.what: Built readiness matrix with explicit unfinished/blocked areas.
chronology_steps.how: Prioritize by blockers and priority fixes.

chronology_steps.title: Control center and bilingual foundation
chronology_steps.what: Defined control center requirement contract and bilingual policy.
chronology_steps.how: Implement panels only via source-bound data contracts.

chronology_steps.title: Freelance and deliverable contracts
chronology_steps.what: Defined corridor and deliverable factory contracts.
chronology_steps.why: Operationality must end with real deliverable handoff.
chronology_steps.how: Bind future delivery tasks to required artifact gates.

chronology_steps.title: Agent factory foundation concept
chronology_steps.what: Captured architecture chain and profile governance fields.
chronology_steps.how: Require passport compliance before accepting profiles.

chronology_steps.title: Gate expansion U14-U18
chronology_steps.what: Drafted new gates and updated registry/laws/base mandatory list.
chronology_steps.why: Whole-repo tasks need stronger scope/impact/language/delivery/agent controls.
chronology_steps.how: Use drafts for next checker and audit implementation tasks.

chronology_steps.title: Auditability package
chronology_steps.what: Created report, chronology, self-assessment, gate receipt, and action card.
chronology_steps.why: Owner review needs compact and deep evidence layers.
chronology_steps.how: Use action card for fast decision and reports for verification.
